notes: Targeted source-aware banding materially improved EQAO ORQ and NAEP Grade 12 persuasive anchor mapping.
The overall corpus result regressed versus fallback because early-grade narrative, KS1 portfolio, and two mid-grade Thoughtful datasets remained unstable.

thoughtful_assessment_grade6_8_persuasive_letter and thoughtful_assessment_grade6_8_summary_iron failed the main-path model-coverage gate; their candidate summaries are zero-valued in the raw corpus output and must be read as failures, not real zero-cost wins.
